# Algorithmic Research Agenda

This folder turns the model layer into a research agenda.

## Core question
How do artificial proxy signals move through ranking, recommendation, human social proof, and budget-allocation systems?

## Research strategy
1. Define the proxy signal.
2. Define the allocation rule or plausible allocation family.
3. Model the manipulation as a perturbation.
4. Identify boundary conditions.
5. Test with synthetic simulations.
6. Compare observed public data to null models.
7. Avoid overclaiming intent without corroboration.
